title: Stéphane
overview: On the set of his amateur short film, Tim unwittingly meets a certain Stéphane, a gruff, loud-mouthed man with stories that smack of a competition mythomaniac. Tim is convinced that he has a golden documentary subject.

trailers.title: Bande annonce de Stéhpane, un film de Timothée Hochet & Lucas Pastor
